refs.description: The kernel's canonical intrusive circular doubly linked list: struct list_head with prev/next pointers and the list_add / list_del primitives used pervasively across the kernel.
Java's java.util.LinkedList, a doubly linked list with first/last references and a private Node<E> holding prev/next, backing both the List and Deque interfaces.
Redis's generic doubly linked list (listNode with prev/next, list with head/tail) used in production for client lists, the slowlog, pub/sub, and more.
